videos.headline: NC State QB Grayson McCall carted off, puts up peace sign on way out
videos.description: NC State QB Grayson McCall gets carted off after a hit to the head and signals a peace sign to the crowd as he leaves the field.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (NC State QB Grayson McCall carted off, puts up peace sign on way out) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Justin Joly hauls in a TD to boost NC State's lead
videos.description: Justin Joly catches the ball near the goal line and fights in to give NC State a 30-20 lead over Wake Forest.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Justin Joly hauls in a TD to boost NC State's lead) 2024/10/05 ESHEET
